ingredients.item: ½ ounce (14 g) dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked and minced
ingredients.original: ½ ounce (14 g) dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked and minced

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon chili jam or hot sauce (such as sriracha or Korean hot pepper paste)
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon chili jam or hot sauce (such as sriracha or Korean hot pepper paste)

ingredients.item: 10½ ounces (300 g) silken tofu, cut into small cubes
ingredients.original: 10½ ounces (300 g) silken tofu, cut into small cubes

ingredients.item: 1 ounce (28 g) chopped cilantro, for garnish
ingredients.original: 1 ounce (28 g) chopped cilantro, for garnish

ingredients.item: 1. In a large skillet or wok, heat oil over medium heat. Add garlic, shallot, and minced chili pepper, and cook and stir until garlic turns slightly golden on edges (about 30 seconds).
ingredients.original: 1. In a large skillet or wok, heat oil over medium heat. Add garlic, shallot, and minced chili pepper, and cook and stir until garlic turns slightly golden on edges (about 30 seconds).

ingredients.item: 2. Add mushrooms, chili jam, soy sauce, and vegetarian oyster sauce, and mix well.
ingredients.original: 2. Add mushrooms, chili jam, soy sauce, and vegetarian oyster sauce, and mix well.

ingredients.item: 4. Add tofu cubes, sugar, stock powder, and salt, and simmer until sauce slightly thickens (2 to 3 minutes).
ingredients.original: 4. Add tofu cubes, sugar, stock powder, and salt, and simmer until sauce slightly thickens (2 to 3 minutes).

ingredients.item: 5. Transfer to a platter, dust with ground pepper, garnish with chopped cilantro and sliced chili pepper (if using), and serve.
ingredients.original: 5. Transfer to a platter, dust with ground pepper, garnish with chopped cilantro and sliced chili pepper (if using), and serve.
